name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
benefit: Short-term crop loans at concessional rates

name: PMFBY (Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana)
benefit: Covers crop loss due to natural calamities

name: Per Drop More Crop (Micro Irrigation)
benefit: Subsidy for drip and sprinkler systems

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
benefit: Free soil testing and nutrient recommendations

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
benefit: Incentives for organic inputs and market linkages

name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
benefit: Seed capital support for small agri-businesses
